Boys.description: Number of 14-year-old boys in each category of time spent in bed (≤7.0, 7.5, 8.0, 8.5, 9.0, 9.5, 10.0, >10.0 hours). This variable and 'Girls' represent frequency counts for the same time-in-bed categories, split by gender.

Girls.description: Number of 14-year-old girls in each category of time spent in bed (≤7.0, 7.5, 8.0, 8.5, 9.0, 9.5, 10.0, >10.0 hours). This variable and 'Boys' represent frequency counts for the same time-in-bed categories, split by gender.
